chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2536 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 02.09.2020 Mr. S.M Naveed Farooqui, advocate for respondents No.2 & 3 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G Sindh *** Mr. Asif Ali Talpur advocate files power on behalf of petitioner, same is taken on record. The petitioner by way of this petition is seeking directions for respondent No.2 to take action against respondent No.5, who is said to be builder and is allegedly not issuing basic amenities School, Public Park, Drainage, Sui Gas and Electricity for the society, where, allegedly petitioner has purchased plots. Learned counsel for the respondent No.2 present and submits that as and when petitioner will approach the respondent No.2 by way of filing proper application, same shall be decided strictly in accordance with law by the competent authority. In view of the above statement of learned counsel for respondent No.2, petitioner’s counsel shows his satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of alongwith listed application with directions to respondent No.2 that, if the petitioner, may approaches him for redressal of his grievance, if any, against respondent No.5, same shall be decided strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
